final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing 3x3 grid infographic poster for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) social media platform.

Style/medium: clean editorial infographic, 3x3 grid layout with clear borders between cells, soft flat illustration with light skeuomorphic touches, magazine-quality typography
Composition: 3 columns × 3 rows grid, each cell self-contained and centered, visible spacing/borders between cells for easy cropping into 9 separate posts, generous whitespace, large readable Chinese text
Subject: sleep wellness tips for women, 9-panel educational content about better sleep habits
Scene/backdrop: cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, soft caramel tones as primary palette with dark brown text, ins-style aesthetic, healing/sleep therapy theme
Lighting/mood: warm, soothing, gentle, cozy bedtime atmosphere
Color palette: cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, soft caramel, minimal dark brown text, warm and healing tones
Materials/textures: soft fabric textures for pillows/bedding, matte paper for notebooks, ceramic for mugs, subtle gradients
Text (verbatim): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", "3. 房间温度别太高", "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", "7. 固定上床时间", "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Constraints: all text in Chinese only, no English, no garbled characters, each grid cell must work as standalone Xiaohongshu post after cropping, professional new media design aesthetic, not cheap or overly flashy
Avoid: cheap marketing vibes, excessive decoration, English text, text overlapping grid borders, cluttered layouts
